evals.description: blog-post mode — verifies all dimension fields populated
assertions: Returns valid JSON without a top-level error field
url field is present
mode is 'blog-post'
primary_keyword matches the input
timestamp is present in ISO8601 format
total_score is a number between 0 and 100
score_band is one of 'excellent', 'good', 'needs_work', 'poor', or 'critical'
dimensions object contains title, meta_description, headings, internal_links, url, open_graph, and schema fields
Each dimension has score, max_score, issues array, and fix fields
dimensions.title.content is a string (the actual title tag found)
dimensions.headings.h1_count is a non-negative integer
dimensions.schema.detection_note mentions the JS-injection limitation
dimensions.ai_citation_readiness is null or not present in blog-post mode
priority_fixes is an array of up to 3 entries, each with dimension, issue, fix, and points_available
Output contains no rewritten content — analysis only

evals.description: ai-citation mode — ai_citation_readiness dimension present and scored
assertions: Returns valid JSON without a top-level error field
mode is 'ai-citation'
dimensions.ai_citation_readiness is present (not null) in ai-citation mode
dimensions.ai_citation_readiness.score is a number between 0 and 20
dimensions.ai_citation_readiness.max_score is 20
dimensions.ai_citation_readiness contains answer_first_format, question_headings_pct, citation_capsules_present, faq_section, entity_consistency, sourced_statistics, and scannable_structure fields
total_score is normalized to 0-100
Returns JSON with an error field
error value is 'content_unavailable' or similar
Does not crash or return empty response
